narrative:
Bay Village-03-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 997 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
